violations.text: The presence of small flies are not controlled as evidenced by live small flies in dishwashing area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the slicer have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. PIC washed/sanitized during inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2025
The ceiling in the kitchen AND dish-washing area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025
Three hand-washing sinks in the kitchen/dish-washing areas were lacking paper towels. PIC refilled. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the dish-washing area. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. PIC refilled. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025
Inspector observed two bags of dried milk with previous moister damage. PIC discarded bags of milk powder. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025

Raw animal foods (such as raw chicken) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as cooked pasta) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. PIC relocated pasta. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025

The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. Establishment to sanitized using 3 bay sink. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer, ice machine, and plates) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC put plates in 3 bay sink and took ice machine and slicer out of service to be washed and sanitized. PIC disposed of ice. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Inspector observed cooked pasta in the walk-in cooler at 110F in containers greater than four inches deep. PIC spread the pasta out onto sheet pans. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025

The presence of small flies are not controlled as evidenced by small flies. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025
Beverage pitchers with lids were observed on the drying rack with moisture. PIC removed lids and inverted containers for proper air drying. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: - mixer - food carts - food containers (old stickers/residue) Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025
Inspector observed handwashing sink in dish washing area in poor repair (sink wasn't draining). New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2025

The floors throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025
The ceiling in the kitchen and dish-washing areas are covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC placed in 3 bay sink to be washed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2025

Quaternary ammonium sanitizer solution was in excess of 400 parts per million (ppm). A quaternary ammonia sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be applied at the strength as indicated on the manufacturers' label. PIC refilled 3 bay. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2025

The door to the outside, located in the back storage hall, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/10/2025
Several plate pellets located in the dish area was not in good repair (observed chipped edges). New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -shelf under flat top grill, -knife rack, -food carts, -can opener base, -microwave, -deep freezer, -plate warmer. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2025

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2025
The ceiling in the kitchen/dish room area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2025
The ceiling tiles in the back storage area is in poor repair (previous water damage). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the kitchen and storage area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in the back storage area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. PIC removed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2025
